accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
Face the student when speaking and avoid covering the mouth.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy social communication 30 minutes weekly
Specialized academic instruction 50 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Diego will write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes a paragraph with a topic sentence in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently begin a classroom task within two minutes

goals.text: Aanya will write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence and correct capitalization in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes two related sentences with inconsistent capitalization.
goals.target: Five-sentence paragraph with topic sentence in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence
